acceptedAnswer.text: TjoeReviewKit is tjoe's local offline AI workflow review kit. It checks prepared examples and answer samples for approval boundaries, forbidden actions, regression cases, output normalization, source-boundary behavior, and unsupported capability overclaims.
No. It is broader than a prompt template. It can include prompt and context assets, eval cases, output adapters, JSON suites, runner reports, rejected cases, and human review boundaries.

mainEntity.name: What does the local runner do?

acceptedAnswer.text: The local runner reads a JSON query suite and answer samples, then produces an offline review report. It does not browse, log in, call models, execute tools, collect runtime traces, or publish content.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between domain_concept_discovery and brand_entity_exact?

acceptedAnswer.text: domain_concept_discovery tests whether an answer covers the general domain. brand_entity_exact tests whether an answer accurately recognizes project-specific entities and names.

mainEntity.name: Can this system prove an AI agent is safe?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. It can improve evaluation discipline and catch known failure classes, but it cannot prove absolute safety. High-risk uses still require human review, external controls, and domain-specific compliance checks.
